svg.text: Backend topology and service integrations | Smart Sumai
profiles | properties | stays | service_requests | conversations | ai_usage | audit_log | error_logs | organizations | subscriptions
Data Retention: conversations 90d | error_logs (resolved) 30d | error_logs (unresolved) 90d -- Cleanup cron daily 03:00 UTC
Env Vars: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY | TWILIO_* | STRIPE_* | RESEND_API_KEY (server-only, never in client bundle)
Deploy: Checkout > Assemble Creds > Migrate DB > Type Check > Build > Deploy > Verify > Alias
Cron Jobs: smoke-test.yml (hourly :05) | cleanup.yml (daily 03:00 UTC) | Auto-issue on smoke failure
SOC 2 Controls | PCI DSS SAQ A | HSTS | CSP | X-Frame-Options DENY | npm audit in CI
Post-deploy gate: Schema check | Twilio webhook match | Health endpoint | CI env vars | Runtime env vars (/api/envcheck)
Auto-issue creation on smoke failure (GitHub Issues with label: smoke-test-failure)
13 external/internal systems | 7 GitHub Actions workflows | 12 API routes | 17 database tables
